mapper.select: SELECT b.bno,m.mno,b.title,b.content,m.nickname,b.address,b.updateDate,b.viewcnt,b.replycnt,b.lat,b.lng FROM BOARD b JOIN MEMBER m ON b.writer = m.mno WHERE b.bno = #{bno}
SELECT b.bno,b.title,b.content,m.nickname,b.address,b.updateDate,b.viewcnt,b.replycnt FROM BOARD b JOIN MEMBER m ON b.writer = m.mno
SELECT b.bno,b.title,b.content,m.nickname,b.address,b.updateDate,b.viewcnt,b.replycnt FROM BOARD b JOIN MEMBER m ON b.writer = m.mno ORDER BY b.viewcnt DESC LIMIT 0, 10
SELECT b.bno,b.title,b.content,m.nickname,b.address,b.updateDate,b.viewcnt,b.replycnt FROM BOARD b JOIN MEMBER m ON b.writer = m.mno WHERE m.mno = #{mno}

SELECT b.bno,b.title,b.content,m.nickname,b.address,b.updateDate,b.viewcnt,b.replycnt FROM BOARD b JOIN MEMBER m ON b.writer = m.mno
AND b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND m.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY b.bno DESC LIMIT #{skip}, #{amount}

SELECT b.bno,b.title,b.content,m.nickname,b.address,b.updateDate,b.viewcnt,b.replycnt FROM BOARD b JOIN MEMBER m ON b.writer = m.mno WHERE b.writer = #{mno} ORDER BY b.bno DESC LIMIT #{cri.skip}, #{cri.amount}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.writer = m.mno
AND b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND m.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT content FROM BOARD WHERE writer = {mno}
SELECT uuid,bno,uploadpath,filename,filetype FROM ATTACH WHERE bno = #{bno}
SELECT a.uuid,a.bno,a.uploadpath AS uploadPath,a.filename AS fileName, a.filetype AS fileType FROM ATTACH a INNER JOIN board b ON a.bno = b.bno WHERE b.writer = #{mno}
SELECT uuid,bno,uploadpath,filename,filetype FROM attach WHERE uuid = #{uuid}
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET title=#{title}, updatedate=NOW(), content=#{content}, address=#{address}, lat=#{lat}, lng=#{lng} WHERE bno = #{bno}
UPDATE BOARD SET viewcnt = viewcnt+1 WHERE bno = #{bno}
mapper.delete: DELETE a FROM ATTACH a JOIN BOARD b ON a.bno = b.bno WHERE b.writer = #{mno}
